name: Cai Gong
page_title: Cai Gong 蔡貢 [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
A Wu officer. When Bu Chan of Xi Ling surrendered to Jin in 272, he entered Lu Kang’s service and, together with Zuo Yi and Wu Yan, laid siege to Xi Ling.

Source Material Obtained from: Romance of the Three Kingdoms IX (Koei)

full_text:
Cai Gong 蔡貢
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Gong (蔡貢). Attacked Bu Chan of Xiling, traitor to Wu, who turned from the country in 272. Cai Gong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
